zh.lifeSummary: 當Richwara von Kärnten於大約1026年出生在德國貝也史瓦本時，她的父親Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog24歲，母親Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein23歲。她於1046年與Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1070年5月10日享年45歲。

zh-hans.Konstanz, Germany: 德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 康斯坦康斯坦

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richwara von Kärnten于大约1026年出生在德国貝也史瓦本时，她的父亲Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog24岁，母亲Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein23岁。她于1046年与Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1070年5月10日享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kärnten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erhardt, Ernst, Hans, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Orlo, Siegfried.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Carsten  , itself a variant of   Christian  .

variants.name: Kasten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Aloysius, Armin, Arno, Dietrich, Eldor, Ernst, Klaus, Otto, Wilhelm.
North German, East Frisian, North Frisian, and Dutch: from a vernacular variant of the personal name   Karsten  .

German: from Middle High German kasten ‘chest, coffer’ or kornkasten ‘grain bin’, hence a metonymic occupational name for the manager of a granary, and later for the treasurer of an estate or guild. See also Kastner .

variants.name: Carsten
meanings: North German and Dutch: from the personal name Carsten, a variant of Christian . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variant Karsten .

variants.name: Karstens
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Vernice.
North German, Dutch, and Danish: patronymic from   Karsten  . Compare   Carstens  .

en.lifeSummary: When Richwara von Kärnten was born about 1026, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog, was 24 and her mother, Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, was 23. She married Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen in 1046. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 May 1070, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richwara von Kärnten est née environ 1026, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen en 1046. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1070, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richwara von Kärnten um 1026 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog 24 und ihre Mutter Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein 23. Sie hat 1046 Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1070 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richwara von Kärnten è nata il circa 1026 nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen nel 1046. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1070, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Konstanz, Germany: ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス コンスタンズコンスタンズ

ja.Schwaben,Bavaria: ドイツバイエルンスチワベン
ja.Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden: バデンアムト フレイブルグズahリンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Richwara von Kärntenが約1026年にドイツバイエルンスチワベンで生まれた時，父Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzogは24歳，母Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballensteinは23歳であった。1046年にBerthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1070年5月10日に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richwara von Kärnten(이)가 대략 1026년 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1046년 Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 5월 10일 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richwara von Kärnten nasceu aproximadamente 1026, em Schwaben, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen em 1046. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1070, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richwara von Kärnten родилась около 1026 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen в 1046 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1070 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richwara von Kärnten nació aproximadamente 1026, en Schwaben, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Konrad von Kärnten II, Herzog, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Herzogin von Kärnten Mathilde von Ballenstein, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Berthold I The Bearded Count of Zahringen en 1046. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1070, a la edad de 45 años.
